name: Turmbar Hamburg
brief: Turmbar Hamburg is a cocktail making class venue inside a stunning circular green-lit tower. The experience: small groups learn bartending technique and cocktail history from a knowledgeable instructor, then drink what they make. Target audience: young Hamburg professionals, couples, date-night seekers. Tone: warm, aspirational, self-deprecating, FOMO-inducing. Key angles: personal discovery (I didn't know I could do this), venue FOMO (Hamburg's most underrated evening), relatable list format (what they don't tell you).
